caption: A man with a shaved head and a dark beard sits in a recording studio, positioned in front of a professional microphone and wearing over-ear headphones. He is dressed in a white t-shirt featuring the black text "stay.nd" on the chest. The background consists of dark, vertically ribbed acoustic foam panels. The man is speaking into the microphone, and his facial expressions shift from a neutral, talking posture to a look of surprise, with his mouth opening wider by the end of the sequence. A tattoo is visible on his right arm. The microphone is held by a shock mount and an adjustable arm, with the label "Neumann" visible on the equipment. As the sequence progresses, the man's eyes widen and his jaw drops, capturing a reaction of shock or astonishment while he continues to engage with someone or something off-camera.
